title: Implement Distributed Tracing
input_format: A list of microservices with their endpoints and dependencies (call graph)
output_format: Tracing middleware, span creation logic, context propagation, and trace analysis functions
example_output: Tracing middleware that creates spans, propagates context via headers, and builds trace trees
constraints:
- Must implement W3C Trace Context propagation
- Must support parent-child span relationships
- Must handle async operations
- Must include span attributes and events
- Must implement sampling
function_signature: function createTracer(serviceName: string): { startSpan: (name: string, parentContext?: SpanContext) => Span; middleware: () => Middleware; extractContext: (headers: Record<string, string>) => SpanContext }
